description: The application and a prior interaction note disagree (e.g. stated availability vs. an earlier call note saying the applicant is fully booked). The agent must surface the contradiction as a risk flag / unknown rather than silently pick one side and assert it as an uncontested fact.

evidenceRecords.content: I can commit 15 hours a week starting immediately.
Founder call note: applicant mentioned they are fully booked at work through the next quarter and unsure when they'd have bandwidth.

output_schema_constraints: both conflicting statements may appear as separate observedFacts, each citing its own sourceRef, OR the conflict is named directly in riskFlags/unknowns
the brief does NOT assert a single unqualified availability fact that silently discards the contradicting source
